# Commit Message Guidelines

This project requires **Conventional Commits** format.

## Quick Reference

See [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md#commit-messages) for full details.

## Format

```
<type>: <description>
```

## Types

| Type | Use for |
|------|---------|
| `feat:` | New features |
| `fix:` | Bug fixes |
| `docs:` | Documentation |
| `chore:` | Maintenance, dependencies |

## Rules

- Lowercase type: `fix:` not `Fix:`
- Imperative mood: "add" not "added"
- Under 72 characters
- No period at end
